summary: Verified Firebase Hosting deploy fix for https://dee-eppn-plataforma.web.app. All 9 review-request assertions pass: 'Welcome to Firebase Hosting' is ABSENT, title is correct, React mounts (#root has content), login UI renders with 'Bem-vindo' + email/password form, JS+CSS assets serve 200 with correct content-types, SPA rewrite (/students) returns 200 with same root HTML, and preview URL login still works end-to-end producing the dashboard. Known architectural CORS issue from Firebase->preview backend reproduced and recorded as expected (not fixed, as per main-agent instruction).

minor.issue: Preview ingress returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * which is incompatible with credentials:include — login from Firebase fails with CORS preflight. KNOWN architectural limitation (preview ingress overrides FastAPI CORSMiddleware). Fix requires deploying backend to Cloud Run as planned. Do NOT modify server.py.

integration_issues.issue: CORS preflight blocked: 'Access to XMLHttpRequest at https://escola-admin-6.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth/login from origin https://dee-eppn-plataforma.web.app has been blocked by CORS policy: Response to preflight request doesn't pass access control check: The value of the Access-Control-Allow-Origin header in the response must not be the wildcard * when the requests credentials mode is include.' Expected per review request — architectural, not a regression.

action_items: (Optional, already planned) Deploy backend to Cloud Run via GitHub Actions workflow so Firebase frontend can call same-origin/CORS-correct backend. No code change needed in server.py — FastAPI CORSMiddleware is already correct (allow_origins=[FRONTEND_URL, localhost:3000], allow_credentials=True). The blocker is the preview ingress wildcard.
critical_code_review_comments: firebase.json predeploy hook for CI removal is handled correctly; deployed assets resolve and SPA rewrite works.
Build asset hashes (main.11f1b68f.js, main.bf3f6c31.css) served with correct text/javascript and text/css content-types — no MIME issues.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Firebase hosting bug fully resolved; React app loads + renders login UI; CORS to preview is the only failure and is expected/architectural)

test_credentials: admin@escola.pt / Admin123 (works on preview URL; fails on Firebase production by CORS as expected)
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded admin and existing dashboard data (7 students, 3 schools, 6 turmas).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Firebase Hosting deploy verified at iteration_4. Welcome-to-Firebase issue is fully gone. Next task is likely backend deploy to Cloud Run to unblock production login; after that, retest login at https://dee-eppn-plataforma.web.app with admin@escola.pt / Admin123. Title selector: <title>DEE — AEPPN | Gestão Pedagógica</title>. Login UI selectors: input[type='email'], input[type='password'], button[type='submit'] (Entrar). Dashboard verified words: 'Painel', 'Visão Geral', 'TOTAL DE ALUNOS', 'ESCOLAS'.

rca of the issue.original_bug: Firebase Hosting served default 'Welcome to Firebase Hosting' welcome page instead of the React app at https://dee-eppn-plataforma.web.app.
rca of the issue.root_cause: Hosting had never received a real release of the React build — only the default welcome assets existed on the channel.
rca of the issue.fix_applied_by_main_agent: Ran `firebase deploy --only hosting --project dee-eppn-plataforma` with GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS pointing at /app/backend/secrets/firebase-sa.json, deploying /app/frontend/build/.
rca of the issue.verification: curl + Playwright confirm: HTTP 200 with correct <title>; #root mounts (4149 chars); 'Bem-vindo' + email/password form visible; static JS/CSS assets return 200; SPA rewrite /students returns the same index.html (HTTP 200) — firebase.json rewrites work.
